title: Enhanced Woods
description: A Datapack aiming to enhance Minecrafts Forests
body:
This Datapack will Enhance the Forest Biomes of Minecraft (Forest, Birch Forest, Old Growth Birch Forest, Dark Forest ,Flower Forest and Taiga Biomes)

Features:

Forests:
-more ground block variety

-now have Bushes similar to those that generate in Jungles

-have new vegetation

-Forest trees now generate differently

-have new ponds

Birch Forest:
-Birch trees now generate differently

-now generate with more grass

-have new ponds

Old Groth Birch Forst:
-have new trees with cobwebs

-have dead Bushes instead of vegetation

-have more ground block variety

-have more leaf litter than other biomes

-now look more "old"

Flower Forests:
-now have Birches with cherry leaves

-have new ponds

-have new vegetation

Dark Forests:
-now generate with lots of flowers and moss

-have new ponds

-trees there now generate with vines

Taigas:
-now generate moss carpets

-have changed trees

-generate with new vegetation

I hope You enjoy the Pack !
